description: A development project manager must track construction costs against the budget and report on any variances.

nodes.task_description: Input all contractor invoices and change orders into the project accounting system.

expected_outcome.value: All project costs are accurately recorded.

nodes.task_description: Generate a monthly budget variance report that compares actual costs to the budgeted amounts for each line item.

expected_outcome.value: A report highlighting any cost overruns or savings is produced.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the variances to identify the root cause of any significant overruns and present the findings to the project stakeholders.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides an explanation for budget variances and suggests corrective actions.
